senses.def_en: to follow in an effort to overtake or capture; chase
senses.example: The police pursued the stolen vehicle along the motorway.
senses.example_zh: 警察在高速公路上追赶被盗的车辆。

senses.def_en: to strive to gain or accomplish
senses.example: Everyone has the freedom to pursue their dreams.
senses.example_zh: 每个人都有追求各自梦想的自由。

senses.example: The pursuit of profit was the main reason for the changes.
senses.example_zh: 做出这些改变主要是为了追求利润。

senses.example: He was captured without much pursuit.
senses.example_zh: 没有经过多少追捕就把他捉住了。

senses.example: What's your favorite pursuit?
senses.example_zh: 你的爱好是什么?

senses.def_en: the unlawful taking of the property of another
senses.example: I reported the theft of my wallet to the police.
senses.example_zh: 我向警察报告钱包被盗了。

senses.example: He said I should have more adequate protection than a burglar alarm.
senses.example_zh: 他说我应该加强保护措施,而不能只依赖一个防盗警铃。

derivatives: burglary n. 夜盗行为,盗窃

entries.mnemonic: en(in)+gage(保证)→保证会去做→从事于

senses.def_en: to attract and hold the attention of
senses.example: The new toy didn't engage the child's interest for long.
senses.example_zh: 这个新玩具对孩子的吸引力没有维持多久。

senses.def_en: to involve oneself or become occupied (~in)
senses.example: Do you want to be engaged in politics or business?
senses.example_zh: 你想从政还是从商?

senses.example: We must engage a lawyer to argue our case in the court.
senses.example_zh: 我们必须聘请律师出庭为我们辩护。

senses.def_en: to pledge or promise, esp. to marry
senses.example: Tom is engaged to Anne.
senses.example_zh: 汤姆已与安妮订婚。

senses.example: I have never engaged in drug trafficking.
senses.example_zh: 我从来没有从事过贩毒。

derivatives: engaged a. 已订婚的;忙的,被占用的;预订的

entries.mnemonic: in(towards)+dulge(温和的)→对孩子过于温和地对待→纵容

senses.def_en: to allow (yourself) to have or do sth. as a special pleasure
senses.example: He no longer indulged himself in smoking.
senses.example_zh: 他不再过度吸烟了。

senses.def_en: to allow (sb.) to have or do sth. even though it may not be proper, healthy, appropriate, etc.
senses.example: The mother indulges her children too much.
senses.example_zh: 这位妈妈对她的孩子太放任了。

senses.example: The bitter taste of disappointed love made him indulge in his own daydreams.
senses.example_zh: 苦涩的失恋滋味使他成天沉浸在自己编织的白日梦之中。

derivatives: indulgence n. 放纵;爱好;特赦

senses.example: To occupy the market of E-business in China, rapid action is needed.
senses.example_zh: 要占领中国的电子商务市场,就要迅速行动。

senses.example: The action of salt on ice causes it to melt.
senses.example_zh: 盐作用于冰而使其融化。

senses.example: In Scene 1, the action takes place in an expensive restaurant.
senses.example_zh: 在第一个场景中,故事情节在一家昂贵的餐厅展开。

senses.def_en: determining what the result of sth. will be
senses.example: Waterloo was the decisive battle of the whole war.
senses.example_zh: 滑铁卢一役左右了整个战局。

senses.def_en: able to make choices quickly and confidently
senses.example: A decisive person is needed to deal with the situation.
senses.example_zh: 应付这一局面需要一个坚决果断的人。

extras.title: “犯罪”种种
extras.content: robbery 抢劫 // murder 谋杀 // burglary 入室偷窃 // car theft 偷车 // terrorism 恐怖主义 // shoplifting 顺手牵羊

extras.title: action
extras.content: out of action 不起作用,不运转 This machine is out of action. 这台机器出了故障。
